description: Alloy observability dashboard for the Zigbee2MQTT → Loki ingestion pipeline. Covers write health, file ingestion progress, dropped entries, HTTP errors, process metrics and Go runtime.

panels.title: Loki Write — Entries Sent Rate (per second)
Loki Write — Request Latency by Status Code
File Read Rate — Bytes/sec per File
File Read Rate — Lines/sec per File
File Ingestion Status — All Active Files
🔄 Pipeline Cross-Validation — MQTT Broker vs Log Pipeline

panels.description:
Three independent sources for the same event stream.

• **MQTT Broker — device topics** (`zigbee2mqtt/+`): device state messages only. Uses single-level wildcard to exclude `bridge/` subtopics (which were double-counting via `bridge/logging`).
• **Alloy File Read**: ALL lines read from z2m log files — includes device states, bridge publishes, NCP/ASH counters, errors. Will be higher than MQTT in normal operation.
• **Loki Written**: entries sent to Loki after the rotation-replay drop filter. Should track Alloy File Read closely. Divergence = entries dropped (rotation replay or pipeline error).

**What to watch**: File Read and Loki Written should overlap. A spike in File Read without a matching Loki Written spike = rotation replay suppressed. MQTT device rate provides an independent signal for device activity level.

targets.legendFormat: Alloy File Read — all log lines

panels.title: Message Rate: MQTT Broker vs Alloy File Read vs Loki Write

panels.description:
Entries read by Alloy but NOT sent to Loki. These were discarded by the `stage.drop { older_than = "2h" }` filter.

Should be zero during normal operation. Spikes indicate a log rotation re-read event was caught and suppressed.
panels.title: Rotation Replay Guard — Entries Dropped

panels.description:
Compares what the MQTT broker received on device topics (mqtt2prometheus, bridge/ excluded) with what Loki stored for `type=message` entries (z2m's MQTT publish logs).

These should track closely. Persistent divergence indicates real pipeline loss.
panels.title: Loki Log Rate (LogQL) vs MQTT Broker Rate — MQTT Publish Events Only

title: Alloy Pipelines on Zigbee2MQTT, GrafanaPrometheus -> Loki Pipeline
